Package org.eventb.internal.core.ast

Class Substitution

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.ast.DefaultTypeCheckingRewriter
org.eventb.internal.core.ast.Substitution
All Implemented Interfaces:
ITypeCheckingRewriter
Direct Known Subclasses:
BoundIdentDeclRemover, BoundIdentifierShifter, SimpleSubstitution
public abstract class Substitution extends DefaultTypeCheckingRewriter
Abstract super class for all kinds of substitutions operated on formulas.
